name: proliferate-workspace-operator
description: Operate Proliferate local and cloud agent workspaces with reproducible checks.

interface.shortDescription: Operate Proliferate local and cloud agent workspaces with reproducible checks.
interface.longDescription: Guide agents through Proliferate workspace setup, local/cloud execution, task handoff, and result verification without assuming a single harness.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Proliferate plugin to plan the workflow, identify verification checks, and produce plugin eval metadata.
